# Support

## Where to Get Help

| Channel | Use For |
|---|---|
| [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/JackSmack1971/solo-pro-starter/discussions) | General questions, usage patterns, design discussions |
| [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/JackSmack1971/solo-pro-starter/issues) | Confirmed bugs and feature requests (use templates) |
| [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) | How to contribute a fix or new skill |
| [README — Troubleshooting Matrix](../README.md#troubleshooting-matrix) | Common setup and configuration problems |

## Before Opening an Issue

1. Check the [Troubleshooting Matrix](../README.md#troubleshooting-matrix) in the README.
2. Search [existing issues](https://github.com/JackSmack1971/solo-pro-starter/issues) and [discussions](https://github.com/JackSmack1971/solo-pro-starter/discussions).
3. Verify your Claude Code CLI version is up to date.
4. Confirm the expected `.claude/` paths exist by running the Verify step in the [Quickstart](../README.md#quickstart).

## Scope of Support

This repository maintains the **scaffold itself** — the `.claude/` directory, `settings.json`, rules, skills, agents, and CI workflow. Support for the following is out of scope here:

- Claude Code CLI bugs → [Anthropic support](https://support.anthropic.com)
- viem / wagmi / ethers issues → their respective GitHub repositories
- Solidity / Foundry issues → [Foundry GitHub](https://github.com/foundry-rs/foundry)
- Your specific dApp's business logic
